en_title: Persona 5 Royal Headlines Xbox Game Pass June 2026 Wave 1
cn_title: 《女神异闻录5皇家版》领衔XGP六月首批阵容
subtitle: 经典再临
opus_summary: 微软公布了2026年6月上半月Xbox Game Pass新增游戏阵容，《女神异闻录5皇家版》领衔。其他作品包括浮岛生存游戏《Solarpunk》、拳击游戏《无可争辩》、生活模拟卡牌冒险《Beastro》等。同时，部分游戏即将离库。

paragraphs.en: Microsoft has confirmed the lineup of games coming to Xbox Game Pass during the first half of June, which is headlined by the arrival of Persona 5 Royal.
paragraphs.cn: 微软确认了2026年6月上半月Xbox Game Pass新增游戏阵容，领衔作品是《女神异闻录5皇家版》。

paragraphs.en: It's a much quieter start to the month following the arrival of Forza Horizon 6 on Xbox Game Pass in May , though who knows — more upcoming additions may be revealed this weekend when Microsoft takes the stage for its annual Xbox Games Showcase.
paragraphs.cn: 相比5月《极限竞速：地平线6》加入XGP，本月开局显得平静许多——不过谁知道呢，本周末微软将在年度Xbox游戏展示会上登台，届时可能会公布更多新增内容。

paragraphs.en: In the meantime, today's Xbox Wire blog lists a string of games for the coming weeks, including floating island survival game Solarpunk, boxing title Undisputed, and cozy life sim meets deckbuilding puppet adventure Beastro (not Balatro, as I initially read). Then there's co-op extraction puzzle-platformer Frog Sqwad and 3D action platformer Junkster.
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，今天的Xbox Wire博客列出了未来几周的一系列游戏，包括浮岛生存游戏《太阳朋克：浮岛家园》、拳击游戏《无可争辩》，以及生活模拟与卡牌构筑结合的温馨木偶冒险游戏《欢迎光临 Beastro》（不是《小丑牌》，我一开始看错了）。此外还有合作撤离解谜平台游戏《Frog Sqwad》和3D动作平台游戏《Junkster》。

paragraphs.en: Day One launches include the early access arrival of Starseeker: Astroneer Expeditions, a new co-op game set within the Astroneer universe with a focus on teamwork. Herdling and Total Chaos join Xbox Game Pass Premium, meanwhile, after previously having been available to Game Pass PC and Ultimate subscribers.
paragraphs.cn: 首发日加入的游戏包括《Starseeker: Astroneer Expeditions》的抢先体验版，这是一款设定在《异星探险家》宇宙中的全新合作游戏，注重团队协作。与此同时，《Herdling》和《Total Chaos》在之前仅面向Game Pass PC和Ultimate订阅用户后，现已加入Xbox Game Pass Premium。

paragraphs.en: Whenever Microsoft giveth, it also taketh away. Here are the games leaving Xbox Game Pass over the next month.
paragraphs.cn: 微软给予的同时也在索取。以下是未来一个月内即将离开Xbox Game Pass的游戏。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。可通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系他，或在Bluesky上找到他。
